title: Personal AI Agent Record
description: Schema for validating a personal AI agent record in Royalty OS v0.5. A personal AI agent acts as a representative interface for an individual. It must not automatically determine ownership, calculate compensation, execute payments, or enforce claims.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the personal AI agent.

schema_version.description: Schema version used by this record.

agent_name.description: Human-readable name of the personal AI agent.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the agent.

represented_individual.description: Reference to the individual represented by the personal AI agent.

individual_id.description: Identifier or reference for the represented individual.

display_name.description: Optional display name of the represented individual.

representation_scope.description: Areas in which the agent may represent the individual.

allowed_roles.description: Roles the personal AI agent is allowed to perform.

prohibited_roles.description: Roles the personal AI agent is explicitly prohibited from performing.

trace_permissions.description: Permissions related to personal trace management.

can_expose_private_trace_data.description: Whether the agent may expose private trace data. This should normally be false.

usage_detection_permissions.description: Permissions related to AI-mediated usage detection.

can_escalate_without_human_review.description: Whether the agent may escalate a usage event without human review. This should normally be false.

routing_permissions.description: Permissions related to attribution, claim, and return route preparation.

can_execute_payment.description: Whether the agent may execute payment. This must remain false for the core Royalty OS v0.5 boundary.

can_enforce_claim.description: Whether the agent may enforce a claim. This must remain false for the core Royalty OS v0.5 boundary.

review_policy.description: Human and governance review requirements for agent-mediated activity.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required before attribution, claim, return, compensation, payment, or enforcement action.

review_required_for.description: Actions that require human or governance review.

boundary_policy.description: Boundary rules that prevent the agent from becoming an automatic ownership, payment, or enforcement system.

similarity_is_not_proof.description: Similarity alone must not be treated as proof of infringement, ownership, or misuse.

agent_is_representative_not_owner.description: The agent acts as a representative interface and does not become the owner of the value or trace.

privacy_policy.description: Privacy and data exposure constraints for the personal AI agent.

private_trace_data_allowed.description: Whether private trace data may be exposed outside the agent boundary. This should normally be false.

wallet_credentials_allowed.description: Whether sensitive wallet credentials may be stored in the agent record. This must remain false.

representative_event_log.description: Reference or settings for the representative event log.

log_reference.description: Optional reference to a representative event log.

external_references.description: Optional references to related systems, repositories, or documents.

notes.description: Optional notes about this personal AI agent record.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp in date-time format.
